case_title: ABS SEAFOOD, INC. VS. JOY JEONG KIM ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER (AS TO DEFENDANT JOY JEONG KIM) IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE ON ITS APPLICATION. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR 5976

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER (AS TO DEFENDANT JOY JEONG KIM)

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Denied without prejudice to being refiled. Plaintiff did not file a proof of service on its application. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR 5976
